purpose: Compare n8n npm/npx quick start with Docker single-container self-hosting

n8n.npxVersionCommand: N8N_USER_FOLDER=/Users/linshangche/Desktop/projects/nuva-report/artifacts/week-06-npm-user-folder N8N_PORT=5686 GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Asia/Taipei TZ=Asia/Taipei N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS=true N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true npx --yes n8n --version
n8n.npxStartCommand: N8N_USER_FOLDER=/Users/linshangche/Desktop/projects/nuva-report/artifacts/week-06-npm-user-folder N8N_PORT=5686 GENERIC_TIMEZONE=Asia/Taipei TZ=Asia/Taipei N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS=true N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true npx --yes n8n start

examples: ERESOLVE overriding peer dependency for zod-related AI SDK packages
deprecated warnings for glob, rimraf, uuid, tar, npmlog, gauge, q, gm, lodash.get and others
runtime warning that N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED is no longer needed in n8n 2.22.4

decision.npmQuickStartValue: Fastest path for local learning, CLI checks, one-person experiments and throwaway workflow exploration.
decision.stopUsingNpmAsLongTermPlanWhen: The instance needs uptime, stable public URLs, OAuth callbacks, team usage, real credentials, repeatable upgrades, controlled rollback, backup discipline, or production-style isolation.
decision.defaultLongerTermRecommendation: Move from npm quick start to Docker single-container for local durable self-hosting, then to Docker Compose plus PostgreSQL before production workflows become critical.
